description_long: This is a freestanding cabinet with a rectangular form, featuring a wooden top surface and a body painted in a deep blue color. The front side is equipped with three doors, each with recessed panel detailing and black handles, as well as three horizontal drawers above the doors, also with black handles. The cabinet stands on four short, sturdy legs and has a solid, unadorned back and sides. The wooden top appears smooth and slightly overhangs the blue body, providing a contrasting visual accent. The overall design is modern yet functional, suitable for use in urban environments such as sidewalks, garages, or public parks for storage or as a work surface.
description: A blue cabinet with a wooden top, three front doors, and three drawers, all with black handles. The design is modern and functional, with a smooth wood surface and sturdy legs.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing two doors, two drawers, and black handles, with the wooden top clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front-right view displaying all three doors and drawers, with all handles visible and the wood top prominent.
description_view_2: Rear-left view showing the solid blue back panel and the wooden top, with no handles or doors visible.
description_view_3: Rear-right view highlighting the plain blue back and side, with the wood top and legs visible.
